ground_truth.title: Pricing: yoga classes in New York from $18 - SOUK Studio
ground_truth.main_content: SOUK Studio offers yoga classes in New York City with pricing starting from $18. All-Access Membership provides unlimited in-person and livestream classes for $280/month or $2,958/year. In-Person only options include drop-in classes at $30, 4-packs for $112, 8-packs for $208, and 20-packs for $500. A Tourist Pack is available at $150 for one week unlimited. Livestream only plans start at $98/month or $998/year, with single class log-in at $20. Gift cards and WellHub mat rentals at $3 are also available. Membership includes guest passes, discounts on workshops and merch, and free towels. Classes can be cancelled up to 12 hours before start time.
